LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF COMMERCIAL COLLECTION SERVICE, INC'S MOTION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE IS OFF CALENDAR. ON APRIL 1, 2014, DEPARTMENT 206 ISSUED A MINUTE ORDER DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Authorizing Service On Secretary Of State
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF COMMERCIAL COLLECTION SERVICE, INC'S Motion For Order Authorizing Service On Secretary Of State is off calendar. On April 1, 2014, Department 206 issued a Minute Order Denying without Prejudice Plaintiff's Motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
